playing_style.value: right-handed; compact pre-serve motion; orange/red racket string color observable in the 0-11s clip window
playing_style.verification_status: qualitative - observed directly from frames t_0010.jpg + t_0011.jpg; not a full career-style profile

pre_serve_ritual_style.value: settle at baseline, racket held at hip before load; exact ball-bounce count not observable in 0-11s frames
pre_serve_ritual_style.verification_status: qualitative - partial observation from frame t_0010.jpg; full ritual cadence requires the full clip

known_fatigue_signature.value: not observable from the 0-11s clip window; awaits the Scouting Committee's quantitative signal analysis over the full 60s clip
known_fatigue_signature.verification_status: qualitative - placeholder; real fatigue signature needs multi-set video or worn-sensor baseline

profile_meta.note: Anonymized profile. The specific player identity on this UTR clip was not verified at authoring time, so all numeric ATP claims (world rank, serve velocity, first-serve %) were DROPPED to comply with G37 provenance (no fabricated stats with fake source URLs). Qualitative fields remain because they describe observable visual evidence from frames t_0010.jpg / t_0011.jpg. The `name` field is non-null so the Scouting Committee's dynamic identity injection fires and agents reference the player by profile name rather than the generic 'Player A' fallback.
profile_meta.scope_decision_ref: DECISION-008 - Single-player deep-dive; Player A only
